mapper.select:
select id, resource_type, title, url, knowledge_points, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from admin_resources
order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
select id, resource_type, title, url, knowledge_points, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from admin_resources where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into admin_resources ( resource_type, title, url, knowledge_points, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{entity.resourceType}, #{entity.title}, #{entity.url}, #{entity.knowledgePoints}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createdBy}, #{entity.updatedBy}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: update admin_resources set resource_type = #{entity.resourceType}, title = #{entity.title}, url = #{entity.url}, knowledge_points = #{entity.knowledgePoints}, status = #{entity.status}, updated_by = #{entity.updatedBy}, updated_at = now() where id = #{entity.id}
